appflow.flow.triggerconfig.CfnAbout: The trigger settings that determine how and when Amazon AppFlow runs the specified flow.

appflow.flow.triggerconfig.TriggerProper.Description: Specifies the configuration details of a schedule-triggered flow as defined by the user. Currently, these settings only apply to the `Scheduled` trigger type.

appflow.flow.triggerconfig.TriggerType.Description: Specifies the type of flow trigger. This can be `OnDemand`, `Scheduled`, or `Event`.
